zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily Standish於1438年出生在英國藍卡爾斯坦迪什時，她的父親Sir Alexander Standish38歲，母親Constance Gerrard37歲。她和Sir John Barnes至少有1個兒子。她去世於1502年5月24日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily Standish于1438年出生在英国藍卡爾斯坦迪什时，她的父亲Sir Alexander Standish38岁，母亲Constance Gerrard37岁。她和Sir John Barnes至少有1个儿子。她去世于1502年5月24日在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Standish
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Standish (Lancashire, now part of Greater Manchester), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + edisc ‘enclosure, enclosed park’. Standish (Gloucestershire) does not appear to have contributed towards the surname.

History: Myles Standish (c. 1584–1656) was a soldier of fortune, from 1620 captain of the Mayflower Pilgrims at Plymouth Colony. Little is known of his origins and early life, but in his will he claimed to be descended from a leading Catholic family, the Standishes of Standish, Lancashire, England. He also claimed to have been deprived of his inheritance, a claim not confirmed.

variants.name: Standage
meanings: in Leicestershire and Buckinghamshire, the name may alternatively be from Stanedge Grange in Hartington Nether Quarter or Stanage End in Outseats (both Derbyshire); but evidence is needed for this. The placenames derive from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + ecg ‘edge, escarpment’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily Standish was born in 1438, in Standish, Lancashire, England, her father, Sir Alexander Standish, was 38 and her mother, Constance Gerrard, was 37. She had at least 1 son with Sir John Barnes. She died on 24 May 1502, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily Standish est née en 1438, à Standish, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alexander Standish, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Constance Gerrard, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Sir John Barnes. Elle est décédée le 24 mai 1502, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily Standish 1438 in Standish, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alexander Standish 38 und ihre Mutter Constance Gerrard 37. Sie hatte mit Sir John Barnes mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. Mai 1502 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Standish è nata il nel 1438 nel Standish, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir Alexander Standish, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Constance Gerrard, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Sir John Barnes. Morì il 24 maggio 1502, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily Standishが1438年にイギリスランカシュアイアスタンディッシュで生まれた時，父Sir Alexander Standishは38歳，母Constance Gerrardは37歳であった。彼女はSir John Barnesとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1502年5月24日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily Standish(이)가 1438년 영국 랭카실르 스탠디시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alexander Standish(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance Gerrard(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Sir John Barnes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 5월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily Standish nasceu em 1438, em Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alexander Standish, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Constance Gerrard, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Sir John Barnes. Ela faleceu em 24 de maio de 1502, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily Standish родилась в 1438 г. в местности стандиш, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alexander Standish было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Gerrard, 37. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Sir John Barnes. Она умерла 24 мая 1502 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily Standish nació en 1438, en Standish, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alexander Standish, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Constance Gerrard, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Sir John Barnes. Murió el 24 de mayo de 1502, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años.
